User Story: As a citizen, I want to sign in with national ID and PIN so that I can access my account.
Acceptance Criteria: Valid credentials create a session; invalid credentials show clear error; lockout applies after failed attempts.

User Story: As a user, I want my session to refresh automatically so that I stay logged in securely.
Acceptance Criteria: Access token refresh happens before expiry; failed refresh logs user out safely.

User Story: As a citizen, I want generated service QR codes to be signed so that they cannot be tampered with.
Acceptance Criteria: QR includes timestamp/nonce/signature; backend verifies signature before sync acceptance.

User Story: As a verifier, I want local anti-replay checks so that duplicate old QR scans are rejected.
Acceptance Criteria: Verifier rejects stale timestamps and reused nonce values on device.

User Story: As a citizen, I want offline-generated records stored locally so that I can sync later.
Acceptance Criteria: Rows persist in SQLite with pending status and are visible in history.

User Story: As a user, I want retry controls for failed sync rows so that I can recover from network failures.
Acceptance Criteria: Retry failed and reset queue actions update statuses correctly.

User Story: As a verifier, I want scanned records queued offline so that field work continues without internet.
Acceptance Criteria: Verifier stores scans locally and uploads when connectivity returns.

User Story: As an admin, I want KPI cards so that I can monitor usage and operations quickly.
Acceptance Criteria: Admin web shows users, records, scans, and active key counts from API.

User Story: As an admin, I want to enable/disable verifier keys so that I can control device access.
Acceptance Criteria: Enable/disable actions persist and are reflected immediately in UI.

User Story: As an admin, I want audit logs so that operational actions are traceable.
Acceptance Criteria: Log list includes actor, action, timestamp, and pagination-ready endpoint.

User Story: As a developer, I want CI checks on pull requests so that regressions are detected early.
Acceptance Criteria: Workflow runs backend tests, web build, Flutter analyze/tests for both apps.

User Story: As a maintainer, I want automatic deployment of admin web on main so that operations dashboard updates continuously.
Acceptance Criteria: Successful main pipeline deploys admin-web dist to GitHub Pages.

User Story: As a user, I want language selection so that I can use the app in my preferred language.
Acceptance Criteria: Profile language selector persists preference and updates app locale.

User Story: As a user, I want profile and security settings so that I can control app protection behavior.
Acceptance Criteria: Biometric toggles persist and are enforced on app-open/sync flows.

User Story: As a user, I want clear sync status visualization so that I know what needs action.
Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard chips show pending/syncing/synced/failed with meaningful messages.

User Story: As a maintainer, I want indexed sync queries so that admin/reporting endpoints remain fast.
Acceptance Criteria: PostgreSQL indexes exist for timeline and user/source filtering.

User Story: As a platform owner, I want rate limits and secure headers so that abuse is reduced.
Acceptance Criteria: Login/admin/token routes rate limited; Helmet enabled; CORS configurable.

User Story: As a new contributor, I want clear setup/deployment docs so that onboarding is fast.
Acceptance Criteria: README and deployment guide include backend/mobile/admin setup and env vars.

User Story: As a QA lead, I want integration smoke tests so that major flows are validated each release.
Acceptance Criteria: Smoke tests cover app bootstrap and critical API route health.

User Story: As a team, we want a 10-minute demo script so that class presentation is structured and complete.
Acceptance Criteria: Demo plan covers problem, architecture, backlog, CI/CD, and live walkthrough.
